name: Debug-Runspace

options.name: -BreakAll
options.description: Allows you to break immediately in the current location when the debugger attaches.

options.name: -Id
options.description: Specifies the ID number of a runspace. You can run `Get-Runspace` to show runspace IDs.

options.name: -InstanceId
options.description: Specifies a runspace by its instance ID, a GUID that you can show by running `Get-Runspace`.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies a runspace by its name. You can run `Get-Runspace` to show the names of runspaces.

options.name: -Runspace
options.description: Specifies a runspace object. The simplest way to provide a value for this parameter is to specify a variable that contains the results of a filtered `Get-Runspace` command.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet is not run.

description: Starts an interactive debugging session with a runspace.
